primary_text:
The first thing you notice is the colour. Deep, ruby red. Not the pale pink in plastic trays under fluorescent lights.

Then the smell when it hits the pan. Clean. Almost sweet.

This is 100% grass-fed beef from a regenerative farm in NSW. No hormones, no feedlots. Raised on open pasture.

The big chains sell beef that's been in cold storage for 14 to 21 days. Ours is at the hub the same week it left the farm.

You can taste the difference. Once you do, you won't go back.
headline: You can taste the difference
description: 100% grass-fed, regenerative beef. Collected fresh from your nearest hub.
creative_brief: Close-up of rich, marbled grass-fed steak on a warm timber chopping board. Natural light. No props, no styling. Let the product speak.
